title: Employer skills survey: 2024
body: "This publication publishes key indicators from the employer skills survey 2024 as official statistics. It covers England, Northern Ireland, Wales and Scotland. It includes insights on:   recruitment difficulties and skills lacking from applicants skills lacking from existing employees the nature and scale of training, including employers’ monetary investment   We welcome feedback on this release.   Employer Skills Survey mailbox     Email employer.surveys@education.gov.uk        "
